zh.lifeSummary: Lady Janet DeBorthwick於1388年11月1日出生在英國蘇格蘭米德洛迪安格雷布利其。她於大約1407年與Sir Adam Hepburn of Hailes - Sheriff of Berwickshire在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安海利斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1464年6月5日在英國蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾海利斯 卡素享年75歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Lady Janet DeBorthwick于1388年11月1日出生在英国苏格兰米德洛迪安格雷布利其。她于大约1407年与Sir Adam Hepburn of Hailes - Sheriff of Berwickshire在苏格兰米德洛迪安海利斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1464年6月5日在英国苏格兰哈丁頓史爾海利斯 卡素享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: Janet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

variants.name: Jannet
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

en.lifeSummary: Lady Janet DeBorthwick was born on 1 November 1388, in Gorebridge, Midlothian, Scotland, United Kingdom. She married Sir Adam Hepburn of Hailes - Sheriff of Berwickshire about 1407, in Hailes, Midlothian, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died on 5 June 1464, in Hailes Castle, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lady Janet DeBorthwick est née le 1 novembre 1388, à Gorebridge, Midlothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé Sir Adam Hepburn of Hailes - Sheriff of Berwickshire environ 1407, à Hailes, Midlothian, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée le 5 juin 1464, à Hailes Castle, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 75 ans.

Lei sposato Sir Adam Hepburn of Hailes - Sheriff of Berwickshire circa 1407, nel Hailes, Midlothian, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. ja.lifeSummary: Lady Janet DeBorthwickは1388年11月1日にイギリススコットランドミドロスアンゴアブリッジで生まれた。約1407年にスコットランドミドロスアンヘイレスでSir Adam Hepburn of Hailes - Sheriff of Berwickshireと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1464年6月5日にイギリススコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアヘイレス カストルで75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Janet DeBorthwick(은)는 1388년 11월 1일 영국 스코틀랜드 미들로스이언 고레브리지에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1407년 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 하일레스에서 Sir Adam Hepburn of Hailes - Sheriff of Berwickshire(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1464년 6월 5일 영국 스코틀랜드 하딩토실르 하일레스 카스틀에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Lady Janet DeBorthwick nasceu em 1 de novembro de 1388, em Gorebridge, Midlothian, Escócia, United Kingdom. Ela casou-se com Sir Adam Hepburn of Hailes - Sheriff of Berwickshire aproximadamente 1407, em Hailes, Midlothian, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 5 de junho de 1464, em Hailes Castle, Haddingtonshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 75 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Lady Janet DeBorthwick родилась 1 ноября 1388 г. в местности горебридж, мидлотян, Шотландия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Adam Hepburn of Hailes - Sheriff of Berwickshire около 1407 г. в местности хеилесь, мидлотян, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла 5 июня 1464 г. в местности хеилесь кастл, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 75 лет.
